#!/usr/bin/env node let mode = process.argv[2] if (mode === '--info') { process.stdout.write(require('../')().info() + '\n') } else if (mode === '--version') { process.stdout.write( 'autoprefixer ' + require('../package.json').version + '\n' ) } else { process.stdout.write( 'autoprefix\n' + '\n' + 'Options:\n' + ' --info Show target browsers and used prefixes\n' + ' --version Show version number\n' + ' --help Show help\n' + '\n' + 'Usage:\n' + ' autoprefixer --info\n' ) }
